name: personal-kanban
description: File-based personal kanban board for VSCode

personal-kanban.tags.description: Tag definitions. Each key is a tag name; value is an object with `color` (hex color string) and `weight` (number — higher weight sorts to the top of a column and wins the dominant-tag color).

weight.description: Sort weight. Higher value = higher in column. Highest-weight tag wins card-border / card-background color.

enumDescriptions: Color the card's left border using the dominant tag
Tint the card background using the dominant tag
personal-kanban.tagColorTarget.description: Where to apply tag colors on a card. The dominant tag (highest weight) is used for border and background modes.

personal-kanban.boardFolderName.description: Name of the folder (relative to workspace root) where the kanban board data is stored.

personal-kanban.enableHooks.description: Enable hook script execution when board events occur (card moved, created, deleted, etc.).

personal-kanban.notifications.description: Enable OS system notifications for card events (moves, review requests, WIP limit alerts).

personal-kanban.showCardAge.description: Show the card age (time since creation) as a small badge on each card.
